heading: Availability of Farmers Home Administration funds for non-Federal share
label: 1281b Availability of Farmers Home Administration funds for non-Federal share
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, Federal assistance made available by the Farmers Home Administration to any political subdivision of a State may be used to provide the non-Federal share of the cost of any construction project carried out under .section 1281 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Quality Act of 1987, and not as part of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act which comprises this chapter.
